name: agent_capability_phase53_parity_gap_matrix
prompt: Please run the Phase53 Windows Computer Use ClaudeCode parity gap matrix acceptance.
prompt_lines: Please run one Phase 53 Windows Computer Use ClaudeCode parity gap matrix acceptance. Use only the project terminal self-check command. Do not click the real desktop, do not move the mouse, and do not type into any other real window. The final answer must include the fixed marker: PHASE53_PARITY_GAP_MATRIX_READY.

You must call the terminal tool and run this safe verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.parity_gap_matrix import main; raise SystemExit(main())"

Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE53_PARITY_GAP_MATRIX_OK, the final answer's last line must completely copy: PHASE53_PARITY_GAP_MATRIX_READY PHASE53_PARITY_GAP_MATRIX_OK gap_count=12 owner_phases_complete=true real_provider_required=true non_fake_acceptance=true claudecode_source_reviewed=true actions_expanded=false
